reasoning: Leya Garifullina's Oct 2025 rating was 2453. A 1% increase requires reaching 2478. She had a peak of 2477 in Aug 2025, but she has since fallen back. Furthermore, recent tournament news from October 2025 indicates she lost a club cup game (e.g. against Divya Deshmukh), meaning her live rating trended below 2453 leading into the November 2025 rating publication. Thus, for the 2025-11-02 and 2025-11-25 resolution dates, her published rating on the Wikipedia FIDE page will almost certainly be lower than 2453, falling far short of 2478. Thus probability is minimum (0.02). By the 2026-01-24 resolution date, she will have had two additional months (Nov and Dec) to improve her rating. Given she is a young streaky player who proved capable of a +27-point month in August, there is a small tail chance she can replicate that form and break her absolute peak. Using the base rate (0.007) and adjusting upwards for her youth variance and recent near-peak performance, I give this a 0.06 probability.
